PROJECT.NAME: heTriNodu
PROJECT.TITLE: Triaenophorus nodulosus, genomic and transcriptomic data.
PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project collects the genomic and transcriptomic data generated for Triaenophorus nodulosus to facilitate genome assembly and annotation as part of the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/) and organised by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) initiative.

PROJECT.NAME: heTriNodu1
PROJECT.TITLE: Triaenophorus nodulosus, genome assembly, heTriNodu1.
PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project provides the genome assembly of Triaenophorus nodulosus. The assembly is provided by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) via the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/).

PROJECT.NAME: ihDacCocc
PROJECT.TITLE: Dactylopius coccus, genomic and transcriptomic data.
PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project collects the genomic and transcriptomic data generated for Dactylopius coccus to facilitate genome assembly and annotation as part of the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/) and organised by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) initiative.

PROJECT.NAME: ihDacCocc7
PROJECT.TITLE: Dactylopius coccus, genome assembly, ihDacCocc7.
PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project provides the genome assembly of Dactylopius coccus. The assembly is provided by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) via the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/).

PROJECT.NAME: icScaAbbr
PROJECT.TITLE: Scarites abbreviatus, genomic and transcriptomic data.
PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project collects the genomic and transcriptomic data generated for Scarites abbreviatus to facilitate genome assembly and annotation as part of the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/) and organised by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) initiative.

PROJECT.NAME: icScaAbbr4
PROJECT.TITLE: Scarites abbreviatus, genome assembly, icScaAbbr4.
PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project provides the genome assembly of Scarites abbreviatus. The assembly is provided by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) via the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/).

PROJECT.NAME: mMonMoa
PROJECT.TITLE: Monachus monachus, genomic and transcriptomic data.
PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project collects the genomic and transcriptomic data generated for Monachus monachus to facilitate genome assembly and annotation as part of the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/) and organised by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) initiative.

PROJECT.NAME: mMonMoa1
PROJECT.TITLE: Monachus monachus, genome assembly, mMonMoa1.
PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project provides the genome assembly of Monachus monachus. The assembly is provided by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) via the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/).

PROJECT.NAME: uoHydFoet
PROJECT.TITLE: Hydrurus foetidus, genomic and transcriptomic data.
PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project collects the genomic and transcriptomic data generated for Hydrurus foetidus to facilitate genome assembly and annotation as part of the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/) and organised by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) initiative.

PROJECT.NAME: uoHydFoet1

PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project provides the genome assembly of Hydrurus foetidus. The assembly is provided by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) via the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/).

PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project collects the genomic and transcriptomic data generated for Agrilus gianassoi to facilitate genome assembly and annotation as part of the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/) and organised by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) initiative.
